content.text:
<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>
i want you to go through the codebase with 10 different code-reaper subagents and tell me what we should clean up in this codebase to make it more maintainable.

I’m applying the code-reaper workflow to the dead-code and speculative-surface slice. I’ll keep this read-only and verify suspected deletions against references, build metadata, and generated-file conventions.

content.text: The strongest evidence so far is concentrated in dependency/feature drift, stale tool configuration, historical planning artifacts, and duplicated deploy staging. I’m doing one final pass on unowned runtime surfaces, then I’ll return only claims I can substantiate.

content.text:
Read-only code-reaper audit complete. No P0 findings.

### P1 — Finish deleting the unreachable pending-import workflow

The staged-update workflow was removed in commit `5c92a3f`, but a large vertical slice remains.

Evidence:

- The only constructor is test-only: [artifacts.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/src/git/import/artifacts.rs:19) gates `pending_import_from_staging_repo` with `#[cfg(test)]`.
- Production initializes the field to `None`: [store.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/store.rs:254).
- Repository-wide search found no production assignment of `Some(PendingImport)`; normal updates only clear it at [reviewed_updates.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/reviewed_updates.rs:184).
- Nevertheless, the impossible state remains modeled by `PendingImportFile`, `PendingImport`, and `StoredRepository.pending_import` at [store.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/store.rs:127), persisted as a JSON column at [repositories.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/schema_contract/repositories.rs:14), and supported by the dead publish operation [publish_apply.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/publish_apply.rs:15).
- It leaks outward as `pending_import_pending` through [repo_reads.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/repo_reads.rs:41), [responses.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/src/http/responses.rs:203), [api.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/cli/src/api.rs:152), CLI branching in [push.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/cli/src/push.rs:50), and UI branching in [repo-primary-action.tsx](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/src/components/repo-primary-action.tsx:50).
- Several tests manufacture this otherwise unreachable state, especially `push_intent_completion.rs` and `git_receive.rs`.

Simplest cleanup: destructively remove `PendingImport*`, the repository field/column/entity serialization, pending-import projection/read/publish branches, response/CLI/web boolean, and tests that construct it. First push already publishes directly via [reviewed_updates.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/reviewed_updates.rs:186).

### P1 — Delete the unowned repository-settings subsystem

`RepoSettings` is persisted and tested, but neither field affects production behavior.

Evidence:

- The two fields are defined at [store.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/store.rs:156): `include_ignored_files` and `review_pushes_before_applying`.
- Repository-wide searches found no production behavior reading either field. `review_pushes_before_applying` appears only in persistence/read DTO plumbing and tests; `include_ignored_files` appears only in persistence.
- `MetadataStore::update_repo_settings` at [repo_settings.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/repo_settings.rs:13) has no caller outside `api/src/tests/repo_lifecycle.rs`.
- `MetadataStore::repo_settings` at [repo_reads.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/repo_reads.rs:126) likewise has no production caller.
- Despite this, every repository gets a separate `scope_repository_settings` table row defined at [repositories.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/schema_contract/repositories.rs:42), an entity at [entities/repositories.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/entities/repositories.rs:83), fact-row load/save plumbing, a DB behavior module, and a read DTO exported from [db/mod.rs](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/mod.rs:54).
- There is no settings HTTP route; `/v1/repos/.../settings` is explicitly asserted absent.

Simplest cleanup: delete `RepoSettings`, the settings table/entity/fact-row plumbing, `db/repo_settings.rs`, `RepoSettingsRead` and its query, `repo_actions::update_settings`, and tests of the nonexistent subsystem. Default visibility already belongs to `RepoConfig`, the current source of truth.

### P2 — Remove manifest and feature drift

Unused direct dependencies verified by exact source search:

- [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:17): `chacha20poly1305`
- [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:26): `sea-orm`
- [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:27): `sea-orm-migration`
- [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:32): `similar`
- [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:34): `sqlx`
- [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:35): `thiserror`
- [scope-core/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/Cargo.toml:36): `tokio-stream`

For each, the dependency declaration was the only match in that crate’s source boundary. The database/crypto implementations now live in `scope-core`; these appear to be move residue.

Feature aliases are also redundant:

- API `local-dev` activates both API `memory-metadata` and `scope_core/local-dev` at [api/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/Cargo.toml:10).
- Core `local-dev` is only an alias for `memory-metadata` at [scope-core/Cargo.toml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/Cargo.toml:10).
- No code or command refers to API `memory-metadata` or core `local-dev` independently.

Simplest cleanup: make API `local-dev = ["scope_core/memory-metadata"]`; remove the two unused aliases and unused dependencies.

### P2 — Remove duplicated Railway upload trees

Both web and CLI deployment jobs stage a usable upload root, then copy the whole project again into an unused nested directory.

- Web copies `web/.` to `.railway-upload/`, then repeats it under `.railway-upload/web/`: [scope-web-ci.yml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-web-ci.yml:94).
- CLI constructs the complete root at lines 247–251, then repeats the CLI and `scope-core` under `.railway-upload/cli`: [scope-cli-build.yml](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/workflows/scope-cli-build.yml:242).
- Deployment explicitly treats `.railway-upload` as root via `railway up ... --path-as-root`: [deploy-railway.sh](/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/.github/scripts/deploy-railway.sh:175).
- Root `web/railpack.json` builds from `.`; root `cli/railpack.json` runs `./scripts/build-railway.sh .`. Neither references nested `web/` or `cli/`.

## P1 — Finish deleting the unreachable pending-import workflow

The staged-update workflow was removed in commit `5c92a3f`, but a large vertical slice remains.

Evidence:

- Its only constructor, `pending_import_from_staging_repo`, is test-only at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/src/git/import/artifacts.rs:19`.
- Production initializes `StoredRepository.pending_import` to `None` at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/store.rs:254`.
- Repository-wide search found no production assignment of `Some(PendingImport)`; normal updates only clear it at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/reviewed_updates.rs:184`.
- The impossible state is still modeled by `PendingImportFile`, `PendingImport`, and `StoredRepository.pending_import` at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/store.rs:127-143,222`.
- It is persisted as a JSON column at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/schema_contract/repositories.rs:14` and supported by the dead publish operation at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/publish_apply.rs:15`.
- It leaks outward as `pending_import_pending` through:
  - `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/repo_reads.rs:41`
  - `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/api/src/http/responses.rs:203`
  - `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/cli/src/api.rs:152`
  - CLI branching at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/cli/src/push.rs:50`
  - UI branching at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/web/src/components/repo-primary-action.tsx:50`
- Tests such as `api/src/tests/push_intent_completion.rs` and `api/src/tests/git_receive.rs` manufacture this otherwise unreachable state.

Simplest cleanup: remove `PendingImport*`, the repository field/column/entity serialization, pending-import projection/read/publish branches, response/CLI/web boolean, and tests that construct it. First push already publishes directly at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/reviewed_updates.rs:186`.

## P1 — Delete the unowned repository-settings subsystem

`RepoSettings` is persisted and tested, but neither field affects production behavior.

Evidence:

- `include_ignored_files` and `review_pushes_before_applying` are defined at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/domain/store.rs:156-168`.
- Exact searches found no production behavior reading either field. `review_pushes_before_applying` appears only in persistence/read plumbing and tests; `include_ignored_files` appears only in persistence.
- `MetadataStore::update_repo_settings` at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/repo_settings.rs:13` has no caller outside `api/src/tests/repo_lifecycle.rs`.
- `MetadataStore::repo_settings` at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/repo_reads.rs:126` has no production caller.
- Every repository nevertheless gets a separate table defined at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/schema_contract/repositories.rs:42`, an entity at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/entities/repositories.rs:83`, fact-row plumbing, a DB behavior module, and an exported read DTO at `/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs/crates/scope-core/src/db/mod.rs:54`.
- There is no settings HTTP route; the old settings route is explicitly asserted absent.

Simplest cleanup: delete `RepoSettings`, the settings table/entity/fact-row plumbing, `db/repo_settings.rs`, `RepoSettingsRead` and its query, `repo_actions::update_settings`, and tests of the nonexistent subsystem. Default visibility already belongs to `RepoConfig`.
